# fortunel-observer

> Agent-first headless platform: a solopreneur's personal brand site, REST + MCP API, and trading bot. Single-tenant V1 with multi-tenant-ready data model. API is the product — UI, MCP, and bot are all clients of the same versioned surface.

Stack: TypeScript (Hono) on Cloudflare Workers, Drizzle on Postgres (Neon → VPS), Astro 5 web, Python trading bot.

## Architecture

- [System Architecture](system-architecture.md)
- [API Design](api-design.md): The REST API is the product.
- [Code Standards](code-standards.md): Read before opening any PR.

## Product

- [Project Overview - Product Development Requirements](project-overview-pdr.md)
- [Project Roadmap](project-roadmap.md): Living document.
- [AI Content Guide](ai-content-guide.md): This document teaches AI drafters (Claude, ChatGPT, custom agents) how to write content **for this brand**.

## Operations

- [Deployment Guide](deployment-guide.md): Runbooks for the two production topologies: managed (Phase A-C) and hybrid VPS (Phase D+).
- [Project Changelog](project-changelog.md): All notable changes to `fortunel-observer`.

## Packages

- [@fortunel/config](packages/config): Shared lint/type/format config.
- [@fortunel/db](packages/db): Drizzle ORM schema + migrations.
- [@fortunel/shared-types](packages/shared-types): Cross-language schemas.

## Apps

- [@fortunel/api](apps/api): Agent-first REST API on Cloudflare Workers.
- [@fortunel/mcp-server](apps/mcp-server): Standalone Model Context Protocol server.
- [@fortunel/web](apps/web): Personal brand site — Astro 5 + React islands + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): expanded reference for deeper AI context.
